subcodes.first_line: O illustrious martyr and Hand of the Cause of God! Thy letter dated the nineteenth of Rabi'u'l-Avval 1337 [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حضرت شهید و ایادی امرالله نامه ایکه بتاریخ ۱۹ ربیع الاول ۱۳۳۷ مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @growth of the Cause, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men
